sorb.title: Termoxid Sorbents — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
sorb.intro.label: About the Product
sorb.intro.p1: Termoxid sorbents are high-efficiency selective inorganic materials developed and manufactured by JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII (formerly JSC Inorganic Sorbents).
sorb.intro.p2: They are used to solve environmental problems in the nuclear industry, for purification of process and wastewater from industrial enterprises, drinking water, and for treatment of alcoholic beverages.
sorb.products.label: Product Line
sorb.products.title: Termoxid Sorbent Grades
sorb.products.sub: Each grade is optimized for specific tasks: from LRW processing and reactor circuit water purification to drinking water treatment and alcoholic beverage processing.
sorb.app.label: Applications
sorb.app.title: Applications of «Termoxid» Sorbents
sorb.app.sub: A wide range of applications — from nuclear power to food industry and drinking water treatment.
sorb.table.label: Supply Experience
sorb.table.title: Termoxid Sorbent Application Facilities
sorb.table.sub: Company products are supplied to Russian nuclear power plants, foreign NPPs of Russian design, and nuclear industry enterprises.
sorb.adv.label: Efficiency
sorb.adv.title: Key Performance Advantages
sorb.adv1.title: LRW Volume Reduction
sorb.adv1.desc: Termoxid sorbents reduce the volume of liquid radioactive waste subject to disposal by 3–10 times compared to evaporation.
sorb.adv2.title: Dose Load Reduction
sorb.adv2.desc: Deep purification of process water significantly reduces radioactive contamination of NPP equipment and personnel dose exposure.
sorb.adv3.title: Regeneration Capability
sorb.adv3.desc: Several sorbent grades allow chemical regeneration and reuse, significantly reducing operating costs.
sorb.cta.title: We Will Select the Optimal Sorbent for Your Task
sorb.cta.desc: Our specialists will analyze the water composition and offer the most effective solution.
